articles.title: How The CCL Industries (TSX:CCL.B) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets
articles.summary: CCL Industries is back on investor radars after a fresh round of analyst updates lifted fair value estimates from CA$97.91 to CA$100.80. Several firms have pushed their targets into a tight CA$99 to CA$102 band, reflecting differing views on how much upside is left but a shared sense that the shares may not be mispriced.
